policy.placeholderRule: Until score, arrangement, musicological, and rights review are complete, development music remains synthesized placeholder material and must not be presented as production-approved.
policy.rightsRule: Composition, new arrangement, and sound-recording rights are tracked independently for every intended launch territory.
